title: Running Kubelet in Standalone Mode — Run a Pod in the kubelet
text:
In standalone mode, you can run Pods using Pod manifests. The manifests can either
be on the local filesystem, or fetched via HTTP from a configuration source.
Create a manifest for a Pod:
cat
<<EOF > static-web.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
name: static-web
spec:
containers:
- name: web
image: nginx
ports:
- name: web
containerPort: 80
protocol: TCP
EOF
Copy the
static-web.yaml
manifest file to the
/etc/kubernetes/manifests
directory.
sudo cp static-web.yaml /etc/kubernetes/manifests/
